perf.regime: pure-torch oracle: per-sequence, per-token Python loop -- gather the seq's valid KV pages, fp32 GQA causal attention (einsum + softmax + einsum over the causal range [0, prefix+p+1)), cast back on store. Written for clarity; the per-token KV-gather materialization it does on every call is exactly the prefill bottleneck the Triton card removes.
